features: Active blade clean system with wash out port for easy maintenance
Dual sided vertical trimmer and Rotary trimmer head
Comfort tip blades for safe & easy use
Vertical guide combs for eyebrow trimming
description: Product Description Anti-microbial Nano Silver for cleaner trimming Vertical trimmer with wash out feature Showerproof with hang loop for easy shower storage Vertical guide head for nose and ear hair Directions 1. Remove the trimmer from its packaging. 2. Clean the trimmer head and body. 3. Insert the battery. 4. Choose the appropriate trimming attachments. 5. Turn on the trimmer. 6. Adjust the trim length if required. 7. Trim the desired areas carefully. Safety Warning Attention: clean the trimmer regularly to avoid bacterial growth. Avoid immersing the trimmer in water. Not suitable for use on children or babies. Box Contains 1 x Nose & Ear Trimmer; 2 x Vertical guide combs; 1 x vertical trimmer head; 1 x battery; 1 x instruction booklet Manufacturer Contact Information Varta Consumer Batteries GmbH & Co. KGaA, A Fred-Krupp-Str.9, 73479 E Wangen, Germany. UK & Ireland: Spectrum Brands (UK) Ltd., Fir Street, Failsworth, Manchester, M35 0HS, England. See more
